name: Hand Print Cookies
recipeIngredient: Various icings in tubes from supermarket
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each sugar cookie dough roll in half.
2. Form each half into a ball and flatten into a disk.
3. Wrap disks in plastic wrap and refrigerate about 45 minutes until firm.
4. Use hand shapes as guides for making cookies.
5. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (check temperature on cookie dough package).
6. Working with one dough ball at a time on a floured board, roll out to about 1/4 inch thick.
7. Place paper hand cut-out on dough and trace with a sharp knife, creating cookie hands.
8. Transfer cookies to baking sheets.
9. Bake until light golden brown.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire racks before decorating.
11. Decorate using icings and candies.
12. Optionally, write family members' names on each decorated cookie (great for kids!).
